selection_policy: Project-only batch; no entity, route, or corridor aliases proposed.
Require alias_id and target_id to exist in current data/canonical/projects.jsonl.
Exclude aliases already present under data/identity-overrides/merges.json aliases.project.
Exclude targets that are themselves alias-mapped in current project merges to avoid target chains.
Exclude pairs matching current project do-not-merge guards.
Exclude records already used as project alias or target in prior codex identity prep artifacts.
Prefer exact project, procurement, package, contract, or named program duplicates with shared validator identity keys and compatible payload scope.
Reject same-name-but-different-phase/stage, parent-program/subproject, financing-resolution/program, agency-wide, or cross-location matches even when they share a weak identity key.

specific_exclusions.reason: Current project do-not-merge guard documents parent-program versus child-project distinction.
Shared key remains contaminated across distinct locations and project scopes.
Amendments and base capital-program records are stage/version records, not safe identity aliases.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: Lexington Avenue 96th-60th versus 60th-52nd bus lane records
specific_exclusions.reason: One record covers the Better Buses Action Plan 96th-60th project while the other is a newer 60th-52nd segment; treated as a segment/stage trap.
Candidate records cite Phase 1 versus Phase 2 repairs, so they were excluded as same-name-but-different-phase traps.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: Full-Service Market Research Retainer Contracts alias string
specific_exclusions.reason: project_full-service-market-research-retainer-contracts is stale as a record id in current projects.jsonl and survives only as record_alias text; the current record-to-record duplicate uses project_meeting-doc-197026-market-research.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: ABLE Program / ABLE expansion / route-specific camera expansion
specific_exclusions.reason: Some duplicates are parent program, expansion wave, or route-specific expansion records rather than guaranteed same project identity.

specific_exclusions.candidate_area: Central Business District Tolling / congestion-relief revenue obligations / TransCore modification
specific_exclusions.reason: Records mix program, financing resolution, and contract-modification facets rather than exact project identity.

command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed repo root and observed a busy worktree; treated unrelated changes as off-limits.

command_evidence.command: ls data/review_notes && wc -l data/canonical/projects.jsonl data/identity-overrides/merges.json data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed available review-note inputs and current canonical/override files.

command_evidence.command: jq '.aliases.project | length' data/identity-overrides/merges.json && jq '.pairs.project | length' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
command_evidence.purpose: Counted current project merge aliases and project do-not-merge guards.
Read the current project do-not-merge guard and preserved the Better Buses Restart/Jamaica Busway exclusion.
Inspected local identity key and validation duplicate logic without running CLI validate.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval import validateRepo and identityKeysForRecord; mine project duplicate candidates with merge, do-not-merge, stale-record, target-chain, and prior-prep filters
command_evidence.purpose: Generated deterministic local candidate lists from current canonical project records and validator identity keys.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval selected-pair guard/evidence check over projects.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, identityKeysForRecord, and raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Verified selected alias/target records exist, are not currently merge aliases, do not hit project do-not-merge, share validator identity keys, and cite present raw evidence blocks.
Resolved the market-research stale alias-string trap and selected the current record-to-record duplicate instead.
Created the scoped JSON artifact from the selected, guard-checked project aliases.

forbidden_commands_not_run: No full CLI validate command was run.
No write, ask, schema, ontology, identity-review, canonicalize, campaign, or dedup commands were run.
No LOG.md, manifest, canonical JSONL, wiki page, DB, generated output, submission, or submission override edit was made.
